1.premise: Gay denial can survive both violence and orgasm.
"Came out of the closet" can mean revealed homosexuality or physically escaped from one.

2.premise: Feeling nothing after kissing a man implies no attraction, but reveals an orgasm occurred.

1.premise: Finding Bigfoot on acid implies a cryptid sighting, but reveals photos of a Black friend in low light.
A Muslim delivery driver's name implies a DoorDash notification, but sounds like a terrorist command on acid.

lines.text: Hey Austin, how we doing?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I come from a pretty weird family.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: My brother, he just came out of the closet.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I threw him in there for being fucking gay.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: But I--
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Now we love 'em, we love 'em.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Not publicly, but we love 'em, you know?
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Just had to ask my dad, we'll see.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Now I know I'm not gay 'cause I kissed a man once
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and I felt absolutely nothing after I came.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Like I was--
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I was good.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Yeah, we're roommates now, that's besides the point, you know?
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I've been doing a lot more acid lately.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Anybody else, acid heads?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Yeah?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: "Pussies over here."
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I love it, dude. I like taking a tab,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: going hiking, like, in the forest.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I found Bigfoot once, dude.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I checked my phone later.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: It was just a bunch of pictures of my black friend like this.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Can't use those. He's got a fresh-ass fade.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: You know what I mean?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: He looks good.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I've only had one bad experience on acid.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: It was this one time I forgot that I ordered DoorDash,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and I got a notification on my phone
lines.label: setup

lines.text: that said, "Mohamed Hazier orders."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: He's on.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: - I was like 10 seconds more.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: - I forgot that I ordered DoorDash
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and I got a notification on my phone
lines.label: setup

lines.text: that said, "Mohamed Hazier orders."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: He's on the way.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: So for like six hours, I thought I planned 9/11.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I was like, "What orders did I give out, dude?
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Popeyes, Pentagon, they're right next to each other, dog.
